query.text:
declare @queryWhereClause nvarchar(4000), @queryFormClause nvarchar(4000), @unit varchar(128) select @unit = case when @ma_dvcs = '' then @@unit else @ma_dvcs end, @queryFormClause = '' select @queryWhereClause = 'a.nxt = 1 and a.ma_vt = ''' + replace(@ma_vt, '''', '''''') + ''' and a.ma_ct = ''' + replace(@ma_ct, '''', '''''') + ''''
if @ma_kho <> '' select @queryWhereClause = @queryWhereClause + ' and a.ma_kho = ''' + replace(rtrim(@ma_kho), '''', '''''') + '''' if @ma_vi_tri <> '' select @queryWhereClause = @queryWhereClause + ' and a.ma_vi_tri = ''' + replace(rtrim(@ma_vi_tri), '''', '''''') + '''' if @ma_lo <> '' select @queryWhereClause = @queryWhereClause + ' and a.ma_lo = ''' + replace(rtrim(@ma_lo), '''', '''''') + ''''
exec MaxvOnline$App$Voucher$View @@refresh, @@pageIndex, @@pageCount, @@lastPage, @@lastCount, @@firstItem, @@lastItem, 'a.so_ct,a.ngay_ct,a.ma_kho,a.stt_rec,a.stt_rec0,a.sl_nhap as so_luong,a.gia_nt,a.ma_nt,a.gia,a.stt_rec+'',''+a.stt_rec0 as stt_rec_id', @queryFormClause, @queryWhereClause, @ngay_ct1, @ngay_ct2, @unit, 0, 1, @@userID
